stemHtml: Which navigation aid may be allocated the frequencies of 108.4 MHz and which may be allocated 109.5 MHz?

options.a: 108.4 MHz may be allocated to a VOR and 109.5 MHz to an ILS.
options.b: 109.5 MHz may be allocated to a VOR and 108.4 MHz to an ILS.
options.c: Either of the two frequencies may be allocated to a VOR.
options.d: Either of the two frequencies may be allocated to an ILS.
